title: Move between core pages with persistent navigation
description: Verifies a guest can navigate Home to Collection to Cart and sees each destination page content with site navigation present throughout.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the link to view the full collection
Click the cart icon
Verify the cart page displays the current cart contents area

title: Adjust cart quantity updates order totals
description: Verifies a shopper can increase and decrease an item's quantity in the cart and the subtotal/estimated total recalculates accordingly.

steps.description: Navigate to /detail
Select a valid finish or material option if options are available
Click the add-to-cart action
Click the cart link in the global navigation
Increase the quantity for the item
Decrease the quantity for the item
Verify the item remains listed in the cart with an updated quantity
Verify the order summary subtotal and estimated total are displayed and reflect the latest quantity

title: Cart quantity increases and totals recalculate
description: Verifies a shopper can increase quantity in the cart and the subtotal or estimated total updates accordingly.

steps.description: Navigate to /collection
Click a product card to view its details
Add the product to the cart
Click the cart icon
Increase the quantity for the cart line item
Verify the cart totals recalculate to reflect the increased quantity

title: Quick add to cart from collection and see item in cart
description: Verifies a shopper can add a product to the cart directly from the collection card affordance and then see that item present in the cart.

steps.description: Navigate to /collection
Scroll to a product card
Click the add-to-cart affordance on the product card
Click the cart icon
Verify the cart displays at least one line item

title: Remove an item from the cart
description: Verifies a shopper can remove a cart line item and the cart updates to no longer show that item.

steps.description: Navigate to /detail
Select a valid finish or material option if options are available
Click the add-to-cart action
Click the cart link in the global navigation
Remove the item from the cart
Verify the removed item is no longer listed in the cart
Verify the order summary updates to reflect the cart contents

title: Proceed to checkout or inquiry CTA is reachable from cart
description: Verifies the shopper can reach the cart call-to-action to proceed to checkout or submit an inquiry without the UI breaking the flow.

steps.description: Navigate to /collection
Click a product card to view its details
Add the product to the cart
Click the cart icon
Click the primary proceed-to-checkout or inquiry call-to-action
Verify the shopper is taken to the next step or sees a checkout/inquiry handoff state without errors

title: Select finish/material on detail and add to cart as chosen variant
description: Verifies a shopper can choose a finish or material on the product detail page and the cart line item reflects the selected option and price.

steps.description: Navigate to /detail
Select a finish or material option
Add the product to the cart
Click the cart icon
Verify the cart line item shows the selected finish/material and corresponding price

title: Browse collection with filters and sorting, then open a product
description: Verifies a design-focused shopper can apply category and material filters plus price sorting and then open a product detail from the resulting grid.

steps.description: Navigate to /collection
Select a category filter option
Select a material filter option
Select a price sort option
Click a product card to view its details
Verify the product detail view is displayed for the selected product

title: Cart shows item details (image, finish, price) for added product
description: Verifies items added to the cart render with key line-item details including an image, selected finish, and price.

steps.description: Navigate to /detail
Select a valid finish or material option if options are available
Click the add-to-cart action
Click the cart link in the global navigation
Verify the cart lists the added item with a product image
Verify the cart line item displays a finish/material and a price

title: Return from product detail to collection and continue browsing
description: Verifies a guest can open a product from the collection, return to the collection, and then navigate back to home without getting stuck.

steps.description: Navigate to /collection
Click a product card to view its details
Click the control to return to the previous page
Click the link to go to the home page
Verify the home page shows a hero section and featured products

title: Remove items and reach empty cart state with recovery path
description: Verifies removing all items from the cart shows the empty cart state and provides a way to return to the collection.

steps.description: Navigate to /collection
Click a product card to view its details
Add the product to the cart
Click the link to view the full collection
Click a different product card to view its details
Add the product to the cart
Click the cart icon
Remove all cart line items
Verify an empty cart state is displayed with a path to continue shopping

title: Navigate to cart from collection after browsing
description: Verifies a guest browsing the collection can reach the cart via the cart icon and the page renders without breaking the flow.

steps.description: Navigate to /collection
Scroll to browse further down the product grid
Click the cart icon
Verify the cart page is displayed and ready for checkout or inquiry actions

title: Cart totals update after removing an item from a multi-item cart
description: Verifies removing one item from a cart with multiple items updates the item list and recalculates the order summary.

steps.description: Navigate to /detail
Click the add-to-cart action
Click the collection link in the global navigation
Open a different product from the product grid
Click the add-to-cart action
Click the cart link in the global navigation
Remove one of the items from the cart
Verify at least one item remains listed in the cart
Verify the order summary subtotal and estimated total update to reflect the remaining items

title: Deep link from collection to detail and keep filter/sort context on return
description: Verifies returning from a product detail page brings the shopper back to the collection with their previously selected filters and sorting still applied.

steps.description: Navigate to /collection
Select a category filter option
Select a price sort option
Click a product card to view its details
Click the control to return to the previous page
Verify the collection page still shows the selected filter and sort state applied

title: Featured product on home opens its product detail page
description: Verifies a guest can open a featured product from the home page and land on a product detail view.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click a featured product card
Verify a product detail view is displayed with a product gallery and purchase actions

title: Load more products without duplicating items
description: Verifies using Load More appends additional products to the existing grid without showing duplicates in the visible list.

steps.description: Navigate to /collection
Scroll to the bottom of the product grid
Click the control to load more products
Scroll through the newly extended product grid
Verify additional products are displayed and the grid does not show duplicate product cards

title: Reach cart from navigation and continue shopping from empty cart
description: Verifies a guest can access the cart from navigation and, when the cart is empty, use the provided route back to the collection.

steps.description: Navigate to /cart
Click the cart empty-state link to continue shopping
Verify the collection page shows a product grid with filtering controls

title: Cart persists across refresh in same session
description: Verifies items added to cart remain present after a page refresh for a returning shopper on the same device/session.

steps.description: Navigate to /collection
Click a product card to view its details
Add the product to the cart
Click the cart icon
Refresh the page
Verify the cart still displays the previously added line item

title: Inquiry CTA shows acknowledgement and is not stuck after navigating away
description: Verifies initiating an inquiry on product detail shows an acknowledgement and returning to the detail view does not show a stuck or duplicated submission state.

steps.description: Navigate to /detail
Select a finish or material option
Initiate the inquiry action
Verify an inquiry acknowledgement state is displayed
Click the link to view the full collection
Click a product card to view its details
Verify the inquiry action is available and not shown as already submitted for the current view

title: Directly navigate to collection from home and ensure site chrome remains usable
description: Verifies the home page provides a working path to the collection and that the top-level navigation remains usable after the transition.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the link to view the full collection
Click the cart icon
Click the link to view the full collection
Verify the collection page shows a product grid

title: Use product gallery controls to switch images
description: Verifies a shopper can switch the primary product image using the gallery thumbnails or controls.

steps.description: Navigate to /detail
Click a different gallery thumbnail
Verify the primary product image changes to match the selected thumbnail

title: Combine filters and then clear to recover full results
description: Verifies applying multiple filters can reduce results and clearing filters restores the full product grid.

steps.description: Navigate to /collection
Select a category filter option
Select a material filter option
Click the control to clear all filters
Verify the full product grid is displayed with many products available

title: Removing all items shows empty cart state
description: Verifies the cart displays an empty-state experience after the shopper removes all items.

steps.description: Navigate to /detail
Click the add-to-cart action
Click the cart link in the global navigation
Remove the item from the cart
Verify an empty cart state message is visible
Verify a navigation option to continue shopping is available from the empty state

title: Filter to zero results and recover by clearing filters
description: Verifies the collection shows an empty-state when filters produce no matches and the shopper can clear filters to see products again.

steps.description: Navigate to /collection
Select a combination of filters that yields no results
Click the control to clear all filters
Verify products are displayed in the grid after clearing filters

title: Cart quantity decrement at one does not go below allowed minimum
description: Verifies decreasing quantity at the minimum does not result in a negative or invalid quantity through normal interactions.

steps.description: Navigate to /collection
Click a product card to view its details
Add the product to the cart
Click the cart icon
Decrease the quantity until it reaches the minimum allowed value
Attempt to decrease the quantity again
Verify the quantity does not go below the minimum allowed value

title: Quantity cannot go below minimum via decrement control
description: Verifies decreasing quantity at the minimum does not result in a zero or negative quantity through normal UI interactions.

steps.description: Navigate to /detail
Click the add-to-cart action
Click the cart link in the global navigation
Decrease the quantity for the item until it reaches the minimum allowed value
Attempt to decrease the quantity one more time
Verify the item quantity does not drop below the minimum allowed value
Verify the cart does not display an invalid quantity state
